_doc: Phase 7 validation corpus. Topic-driven (Researcher plans + searches PubMed). Each entry exercises one or more architectural axes (study type, geo, demographic). Target: ≥50 distinct PMIDs landed across the run + every category covered. Categories also drive the per-axis coverage report in scripts/phase7_run.py.

categories.rct: Randomized controlled trial (highest evidence_grade auto-promote path)
categories.case_report: Case report / series (low grade, should land in review queue)
categories.contradicting: Topics with known opposing findings (exercises novelty-gate contradiction detector)
categories.guideline_proxy: Society/consensus guideline (proxy for WHO PDFs deferred to Phase 1.5)

topics.topic: artemisinin-based combination therapy versus chloroquine for uncomplicated malaria randomized trial
